title: Gobba's Crystal PVP Modpack
description: the best cpvp modpack for fps and more
body:
The best crystal pvp modpack. DO you want Good fps and agood crystal pvp experince then look no further because this modpack is one of the best for all things crystal pvp. This pvp pack adds stuff like Client Side Crystals optimizer and zoom if you want you should install the feather client mod to change and add more stuff! remember to check out my yt channel https://www.youtube.com/@gobbagooshy
